summary: Super Admin Dashboard tested successfully. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for: 3 summary cards (Project Value, Income, Balance), expense bar (Total Expense, Cash in Book), project list with all columns, Create Client/Project dialog with form validation, View All Projects navigation, project row click navigation, and non-super-admin basic dashboard view.
seed_data_creation: Test projects created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Dashboard fully functional. Backend endpoint /api/admin/dashboard-summary returns totals (project_total_value, project_addition_cost, income_project, income_additional, balance_project, balance_additional, total_expense, cash_in_book) and project summaries. Frontend shows 3 summary cards, expense bar, and project list. Create Project dialog includes start_date and expected_completion fields. Non-super-admin users see basic dashboard with Projects, Work Orders, Notifications cards.

features_tested.super_admin_dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with correct layout
features_tested.3_summary_cards_display: PASS - Project Value, Income, Balance sections displayed
features_tested.expense_bar_shows: PASS - Total Expense, Cash in Book displayed
features_tested.all_projects_list: PASS - Shows all projects with Value, Income, Balance, Status columns
features_tested.create_project_dialog_opens: PASS - Dialog opens when button clicked
features_tested.create_project_form_validates: PASS - Required fields validated (422 on missing name/client_name)
features_tested.create_project_form_submits: PASS - Form submits successfully with all fields
features_tested.dashboard_updates_after_creation: PASS - Dashboard updates immediately after project creation
features_tested.project_row_click_navigation: PASS - Clicking project row navigates to /projects/{id}
features_tested.non_super_admin_basic_dashboard: PASS - PM user sees basic dashboard instead of Super Admin view

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/demo-login: PASS - Login works for super_admin and pm
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/admin/dashboard-summary: PASS - Returns totals and project summaries
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/projects: PASS - Creates project with all fields
